briefdescription.para: < shift constant to place slr id
Source of PDI is Image Store.
This function sends IPI request to provides PDI execution.

parameterdescription.para: 64bit PDI address located in the Source.
Used to store the plm error status.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to Load image.

parameterdescription.para: Node id of ddr copied image.
To verify with the FuncID of the image copied to DDR.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to get image information.

parameterdescription.para: Node id of ddr copied image.
Pointer to the structure XLoader_ImageInfo which is used to store the image information.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to gets ImageInfo Table.

parameterdescription.para: Buffer address to copy the ImageInfo.
To get the number of entries returned.

listitem.para: Typically be Continue[31 bit] set to 0, In case the first call indicated that more entries are available then this can be set to 1 present we are not supporting more entries , So returning XST_FAILURE if continue parameter is 1.

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u64 PdiSrcAddr, u64 DestBuffAddr, u32 DestBuffSize)
memberdef.name: XLoader_ExtractMetaheader

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to Extract meta header.

parameterdescription.para: size of the destination buffer in bytes.

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, XLoader_PdiSrc BootMode, XLoader_FlashType Type, u32 ImageLocation)
memberdef.name: XLoader_UpdateMultiboot

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to update multiboot.

parameterdescription.para: Location of Image in the boot device.

memberdef.argsstring: (XLoader_ClientInstance *InstancePtr, u32 PdiId, const u64 PdiAddr, u32 PdiSize)
memberdef.name: XLoader_AddImageStorePdi

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to add Image store pdi.

parameterdescription.para: Address to store Image store pdi's maintained by PLM.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to remove Image store pdi.

parameterdescription.para: Id of the PDI to be removed from Image Store.

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to get ATF Handoff parameters.

parameterdescription.para: Address to store the handoff parameter information (Input).
Maximum number of bytes that can be stored in the buffer (Input).
To get the size of the buffer in bytes (Output).

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to read selective frames from configuration memory.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to structure which contains parameters of CFI selective readback command

inbodydescription.para: Include SLR index in API ID

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to instance XLoader_ClientInstance

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS - On valid input SlrIndex.
XST_FAILURE - On non valid input SlrIndex

briefdescription.para: This function sends IPI request to get optional data from the PDI available in DDR or Image Store.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the output buffer wheren optional data shall be copied
Size of destination buffer in bytes

briefdescription.para: This file Contains the client function prototypes, defines and macros.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 dd 01/09/24 Initial release har 03/05/24 Fixed doxygen warnings pre 08/22/24 Added XLoader_CfiSelectiveReadback, XLoader_InputSlrIndex functions pre 10/26/24 Removed XLoader_LoadReadBackPdi API 2.3 aa 09/29/25 Added UFS support as pdisrc option for partial PDI load 2.4 sri 03/26/26 Included header file for cache disable option vm 03/30/26 Added support for OSPI as pdi source to get the optional data
